purpose: Compact progress snapshot for humans, Codex, Claude and future agents.

Codex.currentWork: First sub-agent wave completed; integrating network, server runtime, UI and tooling findings into wiki/docs.
Codex.nextExpectedOutput: Validate docs/wiki parity, commit/push docs branch and GitHub wiki, then refresh the progress dashboard.

Claude.currentWork: PVF hardening implementation playbook is published in Deep-Review-Findings.md; Claude may claim another bounded lane next.
Claude.nextExpectedOutput: Code-owner review of the PVF playbook, or a new Claude claim event for the next autonomous source-backed lane.

Hilbert.currentWork: Read-only network/PV report completed and integrated into Networking, Feature Status and agent-context.
Hilbert.nextExpectedOutput: Review future PV hardening implementation if requested.

Cicero.currentWork: Read-only server runtime report completed and integrated into Server Gameplay Runtime Atlas and Feature Status.
Cicero.nextExpectedOutput: Review future server-loop or commander/economy implementation if requested.

Curie.currentWork: Read-only UI/HUD/dialog report completed and integrated into Client UI atlas and Feature Status.
Curie.nextExpectedOutput: Review future UI/HUD work if requested.

Meitner.currentWork: Read-only tooling/integration report completed and integrated into Tools, Integrations, Content Structure and agent-context.
Meitner.nextExpectedOutput: Review future build/tooling changes if requested.

sourceScope: Any bounded source-backed undocumented subsystem, stale assumption or risk register item.

lanes.output: Deep-Review-Findings.md Round 3 PVF hardening implementation playbook

updateProtocol: Before substantial work, update agent-collaboration.json and append a claim event to agent-events.jsonl.
For long work, append heartbeat events with current source scope.
For source-backed issues, append finding events and add Agent-Worklog.md notes.
When done, append complete or handoff events and update the dashboard/status files if the visible progress changed.
